title: has_boat_management
summary: True iff a Person holds an active PersonProduct row whose TemporalProduct has grants_boat_management=True. The entitlement that gates boat registration and co-owner accept.

source.predicate: EXISTS PersonProduct(person_uuid=P) JOIN TemporalProduct ON PersonProduct.product_id = TemporalProduct.id WHERE TemporalProduct.grants_boat_management = True
